/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m33 -mthumb -march=armv8-m.main+fp+dsp -mfloat-abi=softfp -mcmse -Og -g -Wl,--build-id=none --specs=nosys.specs -nostartfiles -Wl,--script=/usr/share/pico-sdk/src/rp2350/boot_stage2/boot_stage2.ld -Wl,-Map=/home/xkonti/repos/logicanalyzer/Firmware/LogicAnalyzer_V2/build/pico-sdk/src/rp2350/boot_stage2/bs2_default.elf.map CMakeFiles/bs2_default.dir/compile_time_choice.S.o -o bs2_default.elf
